title: Echoes in the Scrap Moon
body: A coded distress ping led the crew to the rusted debris fields of Tannhauser's moon, where old Separatist hulls drift in slow collision. The signal came from inside a cruiser section marked as picked clean decades ago.

Nix found fresh plasma scoring along the access spine while Juno pulled a fragmented manifest from the ship's dead computer. Kade negotiated with a scavenger clan long enough to learn that someone had been buying intact clone-era targeting cores.
The crew escaped with a damaged core and a partial name: the Cinder Cartel. The wreck shifted behind them, sealing whatever else was still awake in the dark.
